segment.source: A compact aside bar that slots into the content flow, pairing a heading and one-line description with a single button. Use it for: mid-article nudges — 'try it now' prompts, related resources, webinar or download pointers embedded between paragraphs of a source document. Prefer 'Minimal Call to Action' when a quiet text link should replace the button; 'Newsletter Inline' when the goal is capturing an email address with a form.
